title: API Overview
body:
# API Overview

The {{SITE_NAME}} API provides programmatic access to all content.

## Base URL

```
http://localhost:3000/api
```

## Response Format

All responses are JSON:

```json
{
  "data": { ... },
  "meta": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 20,
    "total": 42
  }
}
```

## Error Format

```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "NOT_FOUND",
    "message": "Resource not found"
  }
}
```

## Rate Limiting

The API is rate-limited to 100 requests per minute per IP address.
